summary:
• U.S.-Iran military escalation following the downed helicopter is driving oil price volatility and creates unpredictable geopolitical risk to Middle Eastern crude supplies critical to global markets.

• Infrastructure bottlenecks in Canada (Alberta pipeline corridor delays) and Iraq (economic deadline July 27) pose near-term supply disruptions, while new discoveries in Namibia remain years away from production contribution.

• Disconnected oil futures markets facing potential price spikes within weeks and declining U.S. inventories amid stable prices suggest market mechanics are becoming unstable and could amplify supply shock impacts.

articles.title: BP announces two-segment overhaul to simplify operations
articles.description: BP has announced plans to reorganise its operations into two primary business segments, Upstream and Downstream, effective from 1 July 2026.
